name: OrderLine
description: Resolves the many-to-many relationship between orders and products.

name: ProductPromotion
description: Resolves the many-to-many relationship between products and promotions.

name: SupplierIngredient
description: Resolves the many-to-many relationship between suppliers and ingredients.

name: Recipe
description: Resolves the many-to-many relationship between products and ingredients.

name: OrderAssignment
description: Resolves order work assignments across orders, employees, and shifts.

name: CustomerAllergyInfo
description: Resolves the customer-to-allergy tracking relationship with severity and notes.
